results.title: Donald Trump considering launching new strikes against Iran: Report
results.description: US President Donald Trump is \"seriously considering\" launching fresh strikes against Iran if last-minute negotiations do not result in a peace deal, states a report by US media outlet Axios.

results.title: Sagittarius Horoscope Today, May 23, 2026
results.description: Sagittarius Daily Horoscope, May 23, 2026: Good marriage proposals will come for unmarried people today; they may also get approval from family members today.

results.title: 19th Rozgar Mela: PM Modi to distribute 51,000 appointment letters today
results.description: New Delhi, May 23 (IANS) Prime Minister Narendra Modi will distribute more than 51,000 appointment letters to newly-appointed youth in various government departments and organisations [...]
